items.title: OpenAI News
items.author: openai.com
items.snippet:
OpenAI has been actively releasing models and announcements in early 2026. Most notably, three new GPT-5 family models were introduced: GPT-5.3 Instant (fast everyday tasks), GPT-5.4 Thinking (difficult professional tasks), and GPT-5.4 Pro (most demanding workloads), released March 5, 2026. Additionally, GPT-5.3-Codex became available via the Responses API, and GPT-5.3-Codex-Spark — a smaller, real-time coding-focused model — launched in research preview on February 12, 2026.

items.title: OpenAI Research | Publications
items.author: openai.com
items.snippet: OpenAI has published several notable research papers and announcements in early 2026. Key publications include work on AI safety and alignment: a March 2026 paper on improving instruction hierarchy in frontier LLMs (IH-Challenge), research on how reasoning models struggle to control their chains of thought (CoT-Control), and a study on monitoring internal coding agents for misalignment using chain-of-thought analysis. OpenAI also released its Model Spec framework in late March 2026, providing a

items.title: OpenAI's new model leaps ahead in coding capabilities | Fortune
items.author: fortune.com
items.snippet: OpenAI has been on an aggressive model release cadence in early 2026. The company launched GPT-5.4 in March 2026, its most powerful general-purpose model to date, combining advanced reasoning, coding, and agentic capabilities. GPT-5.4 features a 1M token context window, native computer-use capabilities, and an upfront 'thinking plan' feature that lets users steer the model mid-response. Hallucination rates are significantly reduced — individual claims are 33% less likely to be false, and full re

items.title: Codex by OpenAI - Release Notes - April 2026 - Releasebot
items.author: releasebot.io
items.snippet: OpenAI has released several significant API updates in early 2026. Most notably, GPT-5.4 mini and GPT-5.4 nano were added to the Chat Completions and Responses API, with GPT-5.4 mini offering faster, efficient capabilities for high-volume workloads (including tool search, built-in computer use via a screenshot-based UI tool, and a 1M token context window) while GPT-5.4 nano targets simple high-volume tasks prioritizing speed and cost. Server-side compaction was launched in the Responses API to s

items.title: OpenAI raises $122 billion to accelerate the next phase of AI | OpenAI
items.author: openai.com
items.snippet: OpenAI has been active on social media and in the news around April 3, 2026, with several significant announcements. Most notably, OpenAI acquired TBPN, a daily tech news show hosted by John Coogan and Jordi Hays, with the company stating that TBPN will maintain editorial independence and continue to choose its own guests. OpenAI also rolled out updated integrations for Box, Notion, Linear, and Dropbox inside ChatGPT, adding new write capabilities and an improved app experience across these plat
